title: ctenitis spectabilis
intro: Ctenitis spectabilis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis spectabilis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
